final:
module xor_gate(
    input a,
    input b,
    output reg out_if_else
);

always @(*) begin
    if(a != b) begin
        out_if_else = 1;
    end
    else begin
        out_if_else = 0;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_if_else = ~a & ~b;
    end
  end

endmodule
